description_long: This is a metallic bottle with a rectangular body and a long, narrow neck, reminiscent of a classic liquor or spirits bottle. The front face features a bold black label with a large white 'T' and a smaller '6' in the lower right corner, giving it a distinctive, branded appearance. The back side displays a detailed label with gold and white text, including references to awards and locations, suggesting a premium or collectible product. The bottle's surface shows a worn, slightly tarnished metallic finish, with visible scuffs and discoloration, indicating age or frequent handling. The sides are mostly plain, with one side showing additional label information and the other side being unadorned. The cap appears to be integrated and metallic, matching the rest of the bottle's material and finish.
description: A rectangular metallic bottle with a long neck, bold black-and-white front label, and detailed award text on the back. The surface is worn and tarnished, suggesting age or frequent use.
description_view_0: Front view shows a black label with a large white 'T' and a small '6' on the lower right.
description_view_1: Back view features a detailed label with gold and white text about awards and locations.
description_view_2: Side view reveals a plain, worn metallic surface with no visible labels or text.
description_view_3: Other side view displays additional label information and graphics, partially visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label: large white 'T' and small '6' on a black background. Back label: gold and white text with award and location details. Side label: additional text and graphics. All labels are rectangular and placed centrally on their respective faces.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Visible surface wear, tarnishing, and discoloration; no major dents or cracks.
